title: segmented field
text: segmented field Database field with a packing code of SC, SU, or SR, used to store very large amounts of data, such as images, audio and video clips, or objects that functionally belong to other applications but are under the control of Uniface. Related Links packing code A mapping between a Uniface data type and a DBMS data type. When storing data, it is passed to the database connector along with the data to ensure that the information is correctly stored in the target database. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
